reach_why: Extends known concerns about priors, heuristics, and anthropomorphic probes, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links universal priors, heuristic shells, and introspective probing under rare-fact preservation.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing models on rare-fact tasks, heuristic transfer, and introspective reports against ground-tracking performance.
explanation: Convincing explanations can fail to track rare truths when priors smooth anomalies and heuristics lose their grounding.
